title: ROM corruption of Super Mario Brothers Special (PC-8801)
description:
Super Mario Brothers Special is a sequel to the original game, made by Hudson for the NEC PC-8801 and the Sharp X1 computers in 1986 and is actually licensed by Nintendo. I'm using the PC-8801 version. More informations: http://www.mariowiki.com/Super_Mario_Bros._Special

23 iterations.

PLEASE NOTE: because I refuse to use Google+, I don't respond to comments and questions sent through the private messaging feature! For that, I'd like you to use this e-mail address if you have any questions: ericpillmayer AT yahoo DOT de  THANK YOU!
